_source: BCU util/unit/Trait.java JSON shape: name, id (Identifier cls/pack/id), boolean targetType, ArrayList<Form> targetForms. DataUnit.getTraits() adds such a user-pack trait to a unit when trait.targetForms.contains(form) || (trait.targetType && Trait.isTargetTraited(traits)). targetForms entries are Form references (FormJson) reduced here to their form id.
_identifier_format: pack/Identifier.java fields cls/pack/id; user pack ids are non-DEF hex.
